Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp.OidcRelyingParty.Builder

Packages that use OidcRelyingParty.Builder
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp
OpenID Connect Relying Party (RP) login support for Juneau REST servers.

  • Uses of OidcRelyingParty.Builder in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp

    Method
    Description
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.authenticationRequestCustomizer(Consumer<com.nimbusds.openid.connect.sdk.AuthenticationRequest.Builder> value)
    Sets a Nimbus AuthenticationRequest.Builder customizer escape hatch (e.g.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.clientId(String value)
    Sets the OAuth client id.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.clientSecret(String value)
    Sets the client secret.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.clientSecretSupplier(Supplier<String> value)
    Sets the client secret via a supplier.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.clock(Clock value)
    Overrides the clock used for session expiry + the ephemeral store.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.clockSkewSeconds(int value)
    Sets the clock-skew tolerance (seconds) for ID-token validation.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.cookieHttpOnly(boolean value)
    Sets the cookie HttpOnly flag.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.cookieName(String value)
    Sets the session cookie name.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.cookieSameSite(String value)
    Sets the cookie SameSite attribute.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.cookieSecure(boolean value)
    Sets the cookie Secure flag.
    static OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.create()
    Static creator.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.httpRequestConfigurator(Consumer<com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.http.HTTPRequest> value)
    Sets a Nimbus HTTPRequest configurator escape hatch (proxy / TLS / timeouts) applied to discovery + token + userinfo calls.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.idTokenAlgorithms(com.nimbusds.jose.JWSAlgorithm... values)
    Sets the ID-token signing-algorithm allowlist.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.issuer(URI value)
    Sets the IdP issuer URL.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.jwkSet(com.nimbusds.jose.jwk.JWKSet value)
    Injects a fixed JWK set for ID-token / logout-token signature verification, bypassing the JWKS endpoint.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.jwkSource(com.nimbusds.jose.jwk.source.JWKSource<com.nimbusds.jose.proc.SecurityContext> value)
    Injects a custom JWK source for ID-token / logout-token signature verification.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.metadata(OidcMetadata value)
    Sets the IdP metadata explicitly, bypassing discovery.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.postLoginRedirect(String value)
    Sets the default post-login redirect target (when the login request supplied no safe redirect parameter).
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.postLogoutRedirectUri(URI value)
    Sets the post-logout redirect URI passed to the IdP end-session endpoint.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.redirectUri(URI value)
    Sets the redirect URI registered with the IdP.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.rolesClaim(String value)
    Sets the claim roles are extracted from.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.scope(String... values)
    Adds requested scopes.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.sessionStore(SessionStore value)
    Sets the session store.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.sessionTtl(Duration value)
    Sets the session lifetime (bounded independently of token lifetime).
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.stateNonceTtl(Duration value)
    Sets the single-use TTL for the state / nonce store.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder.userInfoClaims(String... values)
    Adds claim names to backfill from the UserInfo endpoint when absent from the ID token.
